0.text: Bilateral pleural effusion measuring approximately 45 mm at its thickest point

1.text: Atelectasis in the lung adjacent to the pleural effusion in the lower lobes of both lungs

2.text: Diffuse emphysematous changes in both lungs

3.text: Smooth interlobular septal and interstitial thickening in both lungs

5.text: Locally consolidated lung segments in both lungs, most prominently in the upper lobe of the right lung

6.text: Cystic areas within the consolidated lung segments
